message:
test(fcp-core): expand connector and credential test suites (+69 tests)

connector.rs: 60→113 tests (serde edges, BaseConnector state machine, metrics invariants)
credential.rs: 91→107 tests (CredentialId edges, host matching, validation error coverage)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
